sidebar.premium_desc: Unlock unlimited campaigns and advanced analytics for just 5€/month.

tutorial.step1_content: Let's take a quick tour so you can make the most out of your new tool.
tutorial.step_dashboard_content: This is your main screen. Get an overview of your strategy execution, metrics, and upcoming tasks.
tutorial.step_planificador_content: A calendar where you can schedule and organize your launches and posted content over time.
tutorial.step_contenido_content: Your content operations hub. Draft, manage copy, and keep your materials organized.
tutorial.step_campanas_content: Evaluate and control your ad campaigns, targeting, and ROI. (Pro Feature).
tutorial.step_objetivos_content: Set clear objectives (OKRs, KPIs) and regularly track your strategic achievements.
tutorial.step_ideas_content: Experiencing a creative block? Write down brain dumps and fleeting ideas so they never slip away.
tutorial.step_biblioteca_content: Your repository for references, visual inspiration, and brand guidelines.
tutorial.step_equipo_content: Manage permissions, invite collaborators, and coordinate your entire department asynchronously.
tutorial.step3_content: If you need to scale, you can unlock Pro features anytime for 5€.

common.not_found_desc: The page you looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

pricing.title: Take your marketing to the next level
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that best fits your needs. Start for free or unlock full potential with our Pro plan.
pricing.free_desc: Ideal for starting to organize your notes.
pricing.pro_desc: For professionals who want no limits.
pricing.secure_payment: Secure payment with Stripe. Cancel at any time.
